---
mode: agent
description: Synthesize interview or research notes into themes and insights
---

Read `ai-workflows/prompts/synthesize_research.md` and the interview or research notes in
`input-notes/`. Synthesize them and write `outputs/ai_research_synthesis.json` plus a readable
`outputs/ai_research_synthesis.md`. Use only the evidence in the notes; do not invent facts.
